task: Generate a novel, plausible hypothesis for the origin of the first self-replicating cell, delivered as a presentation folder.
final_hypothesis: The Cofactor Ratchet: compartment, metabolism and heredity co-emerge as three faces of one chemically-active coacervate droplet; nucleotide cofactors are the pivot (metabolism + growth + gene-raw-material); sequence heredity is 'handed off' from compositional heredity precisely when the compositional ceiling is reached.
method_notes: Abstract, transparent simulations chosen to isolate logic (ceiling? handoff breaks it?), not to reproduce specific chemistry. All DOIs verified against OpenAlex; none from memory.

steps.action: Literature survey (web search) across 5 subareas: active/proliferating coacervates; compositional inheritance/GARD; coacervate-to-vesicle transition; cofactor molecular-fossils; nucleotide-cofactor world.
steps.outcome: Confirmed all building blocks are real and current; two key reframings identified (droplets already have all three 'eggs'; the hard step is growing the heredity channel).

steps.action: Verified workspace write access to project folder and OpenAlex API key availability.
steps.outcome: Folder writable; OPENALEX_API_KEY present; used Python stdlib urllib (requests not installed).

steps.action: Formalized the causal chain (soup -> active coacervate -> cofactor-run metabolism=growth -> compositional inheritance -> compositional ceiling -> ligation handoff -> Eigen ratchet -> membrane last) and the four novel claims.
steps.outcome: result.md structure fixed; 'heredity handoff at the ceiling' identified as the single novel transition.

steps.action: Queried OpenAlex (search) for ~22 key papers; then direct-DOI-lookup verification for classics that did not surface by search (White 1976, Eigen 1971, Vasas 2010).
steps.outcome: Real DOIs obtained. Two guessed DOIs (Oparin, Eschenmoser) returned unrelated papers and were rejected -> confabulation avoided.

steps.action: Consolidated 26-source base; programmatically verified all 24 DOIs against OpenAlex by title-overlap.
steps.outcome: 24/24 verified (1 heuristic false-positive on 'Protocells and RNA Self-Replication' confirmed identical). 2 pre-DOI classics cited as monograph/essay.

steps.action: Built GARD-style compositional-assembly model (mutual-catalysis matrix beta, tau-leaping accretion, binomial division). Ran one tracked lineage.
steps.outcome: Composome emerges: consecutive-generation self-similarity H=0.99, vs feedstock H=0.16. Composomes are self-reinforcing attractors.

steps.action: Heritability test: parent->offspring compositional similarity vs random-assembly null.
steps.outcome: H_within=0.99 vs H_null=0.12 -> composition transmitted across division far above chance.

steps.action: First parallel composome census failed (kernel-defined function not picklable), then module-not-found (cwd != workspace).
steps.outcome: Fixed by moving model to importable gard_model.py and adding workspace to sys.path.

steps.action: Composome census across repertoire sizes N=20..200 (distinct attractors via greedy cosine clustering).
steps.outcome: Distinct composome count stays single-digit (1-9) and does NOT scale with N -> compositional ceiling ~1-3 bits. Reproduces Vasas & Szathmary 2010 limited-evolvability result.

steps.action: Built a compositional-information 'channel' model for the handoff; it gave non-monotone, noisy bits.
steps.outcome: DISCARDED as the wrong abstraction (independent binary features + BSC capacity misfits weak correlated features). Rebuilt handoff on the census-derived ceiling instead.

steps.action: Temporal ratchet: Wright-Fisher protocell population; adaptation via composome quality (Phase 1) then via a copyable L-site template seeded at handoff time T_h (Phase 2), with per-site copy fidelity q.
steps.outcome: Trait plateaus at compositional ceiling (0.470) then breaks through to 1.327 after handoff; heritable info 3 -> 27 bits.
Control stays flat at 0.470 for 1200 gens (confirms a real ceiling, not slow progress). Across seeds: plateau 0.433 tracks ceiling 0.439; breakthrough ~3x above ceiling.

steps.action: Eigen error threshold L_max=ln(sigma)/(1-q) computed across fidelity and superiority; located the ~4-site handoff template.
steps.outcome: A 4-site template survives at ~50% error/site (non-enzymatic reach); improving q lengthens L_max -> positive feedback (ratchet escapement).

steps.action: Built Table 1 (10 nucleotide-derived cofactor molecular fossils) and Table 2 (6-framework comparison) as CSV.
steps.outcome: Tables written; Cofactor Ratchet row highlighted as the only 'HIGH integration' framework.

steps.action: Loaded figure-style skill; rendered Fig1 schematic, Fig2 (heritability+ceiling), Fig3 (ratchet+control), Fig4 (Eigen), plus Table1/Table2 as PNGs. Ran bbox + perceptual checks; fixed fig2 label padding and table2 overflow.
steps.outcome: 6 publication-grade figure images; all overlaps resolved or confirmed false-positive (cross-panel legend text).

steps.action: Wrote result.md (hypothesis, 8-step mechanism, novelty, 5 predictions, 4 falsifiers, limitations), reasoning.md (line of thought incl. wrong turns), sources.md (26 verified sources).
steps.outcome: Prose deliverables complete with inline figure references.

steps.action: Wrote process_trace.json and copied the full presentation folder into the CS Origin of Life project folder.

key_quantitative_results.compositional_ceiling_distinct_composome: single-digit (1-9), does not scale with repertoire N

dois_rejected_as_confabulated: guessed Eschenmoser DOI (returned unrelated Tetrahedron Letters paper)
models_discarded: compositional-information BSC-capacity channel model (wrong abstraction, noisy non-monotone output)
post_audit_fixes: fig2 Panel B: N=200 (C=1, 0-bit) point was invisible on the log axis; re-rendered as an open floor marker with annotation (reinforces the flat-ceiling claim).
result.md: corrected Agrawal et al. 2024 DOI prefix 10.1038 -> 10.1126 (Science Advances is AAAS); now consistent with sources.md.

sources.md: added verified Higgs & Lehman 2014 (RNA World, Nat Rev Genet, 10.1038/nrg3841; year per OpenAlex online-first lookup) to the bibliography — it was referenced in the Table-2 mapping but missing from the source list.

honest_limitations: Hypothesis, not a demonstrated pathway; origin of life remains unsolved.
Simulations are abstract logic demonstrations, not molecular chemistry.
Specific first cofactor-catalysed growth reaction is not identified.
The ligation handoff is the least experimentally-constrained link and is flagged as the key experiment.
